top_papers.title: Allergic reactivity of the Pikes Peak region.
top_papers.abstract: Despite the introduction of many new species from other areas, a skin test survey of patients visiting our allergy office shows that the plants causing hay fever in this area continue to be the same as in years past. Each physician should evaluate potential allergens in his own area, as our survey reveals the inadequacy of commercially available regional allergy diagnostic and treatment sets.
